name: @cyborg7/desktop
description: Cyborg desktop app — Electron shell with embedded daemon lifecycle
author: Cyborg7

scripts.build: pnpm run build:ui && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run build:daemon-bundle && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test desktop-error-report.test.ts daemon-claim-decision.test.ts daemon-port-guard.test.ts login-shell-env.test.ts
